name: index-coverage-extractor
description: This script allows users of Google Search Console to extract all the different reports from the Index Coverage report section and the Sitemap Coverage report section of the platform.

scripts.reset: node -e "import('fs/promises').then(f=>f.rm('chrome-profile',{recursive:true,force:true})).then(()=>console.log('Session cleared. Run npm start to log in again.'));"

author: Jose Luis Hernando
